File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/modals/s3-browser/abort-uploads/AbortUploadsModal.tsx Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file: ### Fix 1 Line: 29 Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]: Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' Incident context: componentName: Button module: @patternfly/react-core propName: variant propValue: link Fix strategy: Strategy: PropTypeChange Component: Button Prop: variant From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning' Code context: ``` 28 <> 29 , ] Fix strategy: Strategy: LlmAssisted Component: Modal Prop: actions Code contexts: (line 33): 32 Code context: ``` (no snippet) ``` ### Fix 3 Line: 29 Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]: In PatternFly v6, icon content in After: After: Incident context: componentName: Button module: @patternfly/react-core parentName: __ComponentReturn__ Fix strategy: Strategy: LlmAssisted Component: Button Prop: icon Code context: ``` 28 <> 29
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 29): `Button.variant` type changed — `'link'` is still valid in the new type union. The value `ButtonVariant.link` is fine. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2** (Line 33): Modal family migration. This requires:
- Remove `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>` and move them to a new `<ModalHeader>` child
- Remove `actions` prop and move its content to a `<ModalFooter>` child
- The body content (`<Trans>`) should be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`
- Add imports for `ModalHeader`, `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`

**Fix 3** (Line 29): Button icon-children-to-prop. Looking at the code at line 29, the Button contains only text `{t('Cancel upload')}` — there's no icon element. **No change needed** for this specific Button since it has no icon children.

Let me also check the buttons inside the modal actions (lines 40-53) — they also have no icon children, just text.

Now let me apply Fix 2 — the Modal migration:

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed
**No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type union (`'link'` was not removed; only `'stateful'` was added).

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration
**Applied.** The following changes were made:
- Removed `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>` and moved them to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component.
- Removed the `actions` prop from `<Modal>` and moved its content (the `<ButtonBar>` with Yes/No buttons) into a new `<ModalFooter>` child component.
- Wrapped the existing `<Trans>` body content in a `<ModalBody>` component.
- Added `onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}` to `<Modal>` (the old `actions` pattern had a close handler in a button; now Modal needs `onClose` directly for the close button rendered by `ModalHeader`).
- Added `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`, and `ModalHeader` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 3 — Button icon-children-to-prop
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 29 contains only text (`{t('Cancel upload')}`), not an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule only applies when a Button has icon children. The other Buttons (inside the former `actions` prop) also contain only text.

chunks.response:
## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed
**No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type union (`'link'` was not removed; only `'stateful'` was added).

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration
**Applied.** The following changes were made:
- Removed `title` and `titleIconVariant` props from `<Modal>` and moved them to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component.
- Removed the `actions` prop from `<Modal>` and moved its content (the `<ButtonBar>` with Yes/No buttons) into a new `<ModalFooter>` child component.
- Wrapped the existing `<Trans>` body content in a `<ModalBody>` component.
- Added `onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}` to `<Modal>` (the old `actions` pattern had a close handler in a button; now Modal needs `onClose` directly for the close button rendered by `ModalHeader`).
- Added `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`, and `ModalHeader` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 3 — Button icon-children-to-prop
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` at line 29 contains only text (`{t('Cancel upload')}`), not an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule only applies when a Button has icon children. The other Buttons (inside the former `actions` prop) also contain only text.
